case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. VS. FREIGHTLING EXPRESS LLC ET AL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FREIGHTLING EXPRESS LLC DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-23-2019
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 1 EXEMPLIFIED COPY) JUDGMENT PAID BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FREIGHTLING EXPRESS LLC $9,561.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,200.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $956.10 INTEREST, $377.90 COSTS, $19.90 E-FILING FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,114.90, SEE SCANNED DOC
